personal_info.name: Mohamed Refaat

Experienced in architecting production-ready applications using Clean Architecture, BLoC/Cubit, and PowerSync for offline-first real-time synchronization. Skilled in integrating AI-driven features (Google Gemini API), native Android services (AlarmManager, Background Tasks), and building responsive, adaptive UI/UX for mobile and desktop platforms.

projects.title: Memory Chat
projects.description: Production-grade collaborative note-taking app with real-time synchronization and offline-first architecture using PowerSync + Supabase
projects.detailed_description: Memory Chat is a production-grade offline-first collaborative note-taking application built with Flutter, PowerSync, and Supabase. The app features a hierarchical organization system (Workspaces → Sections → Memory Boxes → Notes) with full CRUD operations and real-time synchronization across devices. The local-first architecture using Drift (SQLite) ensures zero data loss and instant UI updates even without internet connectivity. The responsive Slack-inspired UI adapts seamlessly between mobile (Drawer navigation) and desktop (persistent sidebar) layouts. Row Level Security (RLS) policies and authentication flows provide secure multi-user data isolation.

case_study.problem: Users needed a reliable note-taking app that works seamlessly offline and syncs across devices without data loss or conflicts when reconnecting to the internet.
case_study.solution: Implemented PowerSync + Supabase integration for automatic conflict resolution and real-time sync. Engineered a local-first architecture using Drift (SQLite) ensuring instant UI updates even without internet connectivity. Built hierarchical organization (Workspaces → Sections → Memory Boxes → Notes) with full CRUD operations. Designed a responsive Slack-inspired UI with adaptive layout (Drawer for mobile, persistent sidebar for desktop). Implemented Row Level Security (RLS) policies and authentication flows for multi-user data isolation.
case_study.result: Delivered a production-grade offline-first app with zero data loss, real-time multi-device sync, and a responsive Slack-inspired UI with adaptive layouts for mobile and desktop.

projects.title: Egyptopia
projects.description: AI-assisted tourism platform with personalized itinerary planning and real-time smart recommendations. Graduation Project - Excellent Grade
projects.detailed_description: Egyptopia is a comprehensive AI-assisted tourism platform developed as a graduation project, achieving an Excellent grade. The app features an AI-Driven Itinerary Planner that dynamically generates personalized travel plans based on user budget, travel style, duration, and preferred categories via custom REST APIs. It integrates a Smart Chatbot (Virtual Assistant) and an adaptive Recommendation Engine that tailors content to user preferences in real-time. Advanced features include real-time debounced global search, dynamic filtering (by city, rating, price), and a weather module with auto-location detection. The app leverages Google Maps deep linking for seamless navigation and utilizes Hive for high-performance offline storage. A secure role-based access system (Guest vs. Registered User) is implemented using Firebase Authentication (Email & Google).

case_study.problem: Tourists in Egypt needed a comprehensive platform to plan personalized itineraries based on budget, travel style, and preferences, with real-time smart recommendations and AI-driven assistance.
case_study.solution: Architected a large-scale tourism platform using hybrid state management (BLoC & GetX) adhering to Clean MVVM architecture. Engineered an AI-Driven Itinerary Planner via custom REST APIs that dynamically generates personalized travel plans. Integrated a Smart Chatbot (Virtual Assistant) and adaptive Recommendation Engine. Implemented real-time debounced global search, dynamic filtering (by city, rating, price), and weather module with auto-location detection. Enhanced UX with Google Maps deep linking and Hive for high-performance offline storage. Designed secure role-based access system (Guest vs. Registered User) using Firebase Authentication.
case_study.result: Graduated with Excellent grade. Delivered a feature-rich platform with AI-powered planning, role-based access, Firebase Authentication, and high-performance offline storage serving tourists with personalized travel experiences.

projects.title: Slumber
projects.description: Smart sleep tracking app with background tracking, gamification, and 40+ unit tests. Features custom Sleep Score engine and ambient audio
projects.detailed_description: Slumber is a scalable, feature-modular sleep tracking application built with Clean Architecture and BLoC. The app features a resilient background tracking system using SharedPreferences and Android AlarmManager, ensuring zero data loss and triggering reliable Local Notifications (bedtime reminders & ongoing sessions) even when the app is completely terminated. A custom algorithmic Sleep Score engine evaluates duration, consistency, and bedtime, visualizing complex health metrics (Sleep Debt, weekly trends) via interactive FL Charts. The real-time Gamification & Achievements system is powered by inter-Cubit communication to dynamically evaluate user habits and unlock milestones. An ambient audio module using AudioPlayers features seamless auto-looping and customizable sleep timers (15/30/60 mins) synchronized with sleep tracking. The app includes 40+ comprehensive Unit Tests (100% passing) to validate core business logic, scoring algorithms, local data persistence, and midnight edge-case handling.

case_study.problem: Users needed a reliable sleep tracking app that continues tracking even when the app is terminated, with accurate sleep scoring, engaging gamification, and zero data loss.
case_study.solution: Architected a scalable, feature-modular sleep tracking application using Clean Architecture and BLoC. Developed a resilient background tracking system using SharedPreferences and Android AlarmManager, ensuring zero data loss and triggering reliable Local Notifications (bedtime reminders & ongoing sessions) even when the app is completely terminated. Engineered a custom algorithmic Sleep Score engine evaluating duration, consistency, and bedtime, visualizing complex health metrics (Sleep Debt, weekly trends) via interactive FL Charts. Built real-time Gamification & Achievements system powered by inter-Cubit communication. Integrated ambient audio module with auto-looping and customizable sleep timers (15/30/60 mins).
case_study.result: Authored 40+ comprehensive Unit Tests (100% passing). Delivered reliable local notifications, ambient audio with seamless auto-looping, and a scalable feature-modular architecture with custom health metrics visualization.

projects.title: Plant Identifier
projects.description: AI-driven plant identification app leveraging Google's Gemini API for image recognition with Clean Architecture
projects.detailed_description: Plant Identifier is an AI-driven plant identification application leveraging Google's Gemini API for image recognition. The app implements Clean Architecture pattern for a maintainable, testable codebase with clear separation of concerns. It integrates camera and gallery functionality with platform-specific permissions (Android Manifest & iOS Info.plist). A modular repository pattern enables easy backend swapping without UI refactoring, ensuring long-term maintainability and scalability.

case_study.problem: Users needed a quick and accurate way to identify plants using just their camera, with a maintainable and testable codebase that follows best practices.
case_study.solution: Developed an AI-driven plant identification app leveraging Google's Gemini API for image recognition. Implemented Clean Architecture pattern for maintainable, testable codebase with clear separation of concerns. Integrated camera and gallery functionality with platform-specific permissions (Android Manifest & iOS Info.plist). Engineered a modular repository pattern enabling easy backend swapping without UI refactoring.
case_study.result: Delivered a maintainable, testable app with platform-specific permissions handling and seamless camera/gallery integration, providing users with instant AI-powered plant identification.

projects.title: Bookly
projects.description: Book discovery app integrating Google Books API with BLoC state management, Dio, Dartz, and GoRouter
projects.detailed_description: Bookly is a book discovery application that integrates the Google Books API to fetch and display books in real time. The app implements BLoC for predictable state management and clean separation of concerns. It uses Dio for networking, Dartz for functional programming, and GoRouter for navigation. GetIt is applied for dependency injection. The responsive, dark-themed UI is focused on usability and smooth navigation, providing an excellent user experience for book enthusiasts.

case_study.problem: Readers needed a clean, responsive app to discover books in real-time with predictable state management and smooth navigation.
case_study.solution: Built a book discovery app integrating Google Books API to fetch and display books in real time. Implemented BLoC for predictable state management and clean separation of concerns. Used Dio for networking, Dartz for functional programming, and GoRouter for navigation. Applied GetIt for dependency injection. Designed a responsive, dark-themed UI focused on usability.
case_study.result: Delivered a responsive, dark-themed UI focused on usability and smooth navigation with proper dependency injection and predictable state management.

projects.title: Fruit Market
projects.description: E-commerce mobile app with categorized product browsing, REST APIs integration, and optimized UI using GetX
projects.detailed_description: Fruit Market is an e-commerce mobile application featuring categorized product browsing and detailed product screens. The app integrates REST APIs for real-time product data fetching, search functionality, and favorites management. UI performance is optimized using GetX state management to reduce unnecessary rebuilds and ensure smooth real-time data fetching. Local storage is implemented using GetStorage for persistent user preferences and shopping cart data.

case_study.problem: Users needed a fast, responsive e-commerce app for browsing fruits with real-time product data, search functionality, and favorites management.
case_study.solution: Developed an e-commerce mobile app with categorized product browsing and detailed product screens. Integrated REST APIs for real-time product data fetching, search functionality, and favorites management. Optimized UI performance using GetX state management to reduce unnecessary rebuilds and ensure smooth real-time data fetching. Implemented local storage using GetStorage.
case_study.result: Delivered a smooth, performant app with efficient search functionality, favorites management, and optimized UI performance with minimal rebuilds.

projects.title: CoWork Connect
projects.description: Professional networking and collaboration platform for remote teams and freelancers
projects.detailed_description: CoWork Connect is a professional networking and collaboration platform designed for remote teams and freelancers. The app facilitates seamless communication, project management, and skill-based matching. It features real-time messaging, task tracking, and a comprehensive profile system showcasing user skills, portfolios, and availability. The app leverages Firebase for authentication and real-time data synchronization, ensuring a smooth and responsive user experience across all devices.

case_study.problem: Remote teams and freelancers needed a centralized platform for professional networking, real-time collaboration, and skill-based project matching.
case_study.solution: Developed a comprehensive networking platform with real-time messaging, task tracking, and skill-based matching algorithms. Implemented Firebase Authentication for secure user access and Firestore for real-time data synchronization. Built a responsive UI with adaptive layouts for mobile and desktop, featuring profile management, portfolio showcase, and availability scheduling. Integrated push notifications for instant communication and task updates.
case_study.result: Delivered a feature-rich collaboration platform enabling remote professionals to connect, communicate, and collaborate effectively with real-time synchronization and intuitive user experience.
